## Privacy checklist

- [ ] I removed access tokens and refresh tokens.
- [ ] I removed Authorization headers and cookies.
- [ ] I removed email/account details.
- [ ] I removed site names, addresses, IDs, NMI values, and serial numbers.
- [ ] I did not attach raw HAR files, private captures, screenshots with private
      values, or raw API payloads.
